treaties.title: Mutual Recognition Accord — Network Republic
treaties.summary: Establishes mutual recognition of citizen credentials, shared anti-fraud measures, consular referral channels, and layered-republic interoperability obligations for verified digital governance participants.

treaties.title: Interoperability & Data-Sovereignty Pact
treaties.summary: Defines data-residency requirements, cross-border incident reporting, canonical API surfaces, and layered-republic governance alignment for sovereign data stewardship.

treaties.title: Consular Cooperation Agreement
treaties.summary: Enables honorary consular officers, document authentication workflows, citizen-support call routing, and credential-verification interoperability under v3.0 protocol contracts.

treaties.title: Observer Status & Technical Cooperation
treaties.summary: Grants AETHERIA observer rights in standards proceedings with voting rights on technical amendments, protocol sponsorship, and layered-republic governance-layer specifications.

treaties.title: Passport Reciprocity Notice — Micronation Fellowship
treaties.summary: Recommends favorable treatment for AETHERIA passport holders across recognized networks; states no binding visa-waiver obligation while reflecting layered-republic reciprocity principles.

treaties.title: Provisional Science & Technology Exchange
treaties.summary: Proposed research mobility, data-sharing protocol, and joint experiment protocol between AETHERIA laboratories and recognized external science nodes.

treaties.title: Coastal Resilience Information Partnership
treaties.summary: Shared environmental telemetry, incident-coordination channel, and public-facing transparency dashboard interoperable with sustainability ministry sensors.

treaties.title: Open Diagram & Interoperability Charter
treaties.summary: Requires open system diagrams, conformant node implementations, and shared incident post-mortems for layered-republic compatibility review.

multilateral.title: Digital States Caucus — UN Civil Society
multilateral.topic: Digital-state participation in multilateral civil-society mechanisms under the Secretary of External Affairs

multilateral.title: Open Government Partnership — Digital Track
multilateral.topic: Open-data commitments, participatory budgeting standards, and layered-republic accountability disclosures

multilateral.title: Micronation Education Alliance
multilateral.topic: Curriculum exchange, mutual accreditation, student mobility pathways, and layered-republic credential portability

multilateral.title: Global Micronation Trade Coalition
multilateral.topic: Interoperable commercial instruments, inspectorate protocols, and layered-republic export attestations.
